filtered_articles.title: New Astro Bot Funko Pops Are Available To Preorder, Out in September
filtered_articles.description: New Astro Bot Funko Pops are up for preorder. We've broken down which models are available to preorder now and how much they cost ahead of their release on September 6.

filtered_articles.title: 7 Burning Questions for the GTA 6 Pre-Order Launch
filtered_articles.description: GTA 6 is alive! Rockstar has confirmed that pre-orders launch on June 25, which means we’re just a week away from finally getting some meaningful answers on what to expect when the most anticipated video game of all time comes out this November.

filtered_articles.title: Rockstar Fans Rejoice, as It Now Looks Certain GTA 6 Won't Get Delayed Again
filtered_articles.description: Grand Theft Auto fans are reacting in shock and relief after today's surprise announcement that GTA 6 pre-orders will begin next week — all but confirming that the game won't get delayed once more.
